prompt: Our Kafka consumer group has partitions stuck in a rebalancing state. The group coordinator keeps reassigning partitions but consumers never stabilize. The actual consumer code is fine — the group metadata is corrupted. Reset the consumer group offsets to the last committed position.

The blue-green deployment is stuck mid-switch. Traffic is split 50/50 between the old and new versions because the weight update got interrupted. The new version is verified healthy. Complete the traffic shift to 100% new.

Our GitLab CI runner registered itself with the wrong executor type (shell instead of docker) and now all pipelines that expect Docker fail. The runner itself is fine. I need to re-register it with the correct executor without disrupting other runners.

The DNS cache on our internal resolver has a stale CNAME entry pointing to a decommissioned load balancer. TTL is 86400 seconds. Internal services that use this resolver can't reach the API. I need to flush just this one cached entry.

An Argo CD application is stuck in 'OutOfSync' status even though the live state matches the desired state. The diff shows no changes but the sync status won't clear. I need to clear the application state so it reads as healthy.

Our S3 event notification is stuck — the Lambda trigger was disabled during a troubleshooting session and never re-enabled. Objects are landing in the bucket but not being processed. Re-enable the event notification without re-processing already-handled objects.

A PersistentVolumeClaim in Kubernetes is stuck in 'Pending' state because the storage class was temporarily unavailable. The storage class is back now, but the PVC won't retry provisioning. Clear the stuck PVC so it provisions correctly.

The cron schedule for our nightly data sync was accidentally set to '0 0 31 * *' (only runs on the 31st of months that have 31 days) instead of '0 0 * * *'. The job logic is fine — just the schedule trigger is wrong. Fix the cron expression.
